heading: Report
label: 10268 Report
text: The Board shall report not less than 2 times per year to Congress and the Secretary its findings, conclusions, and recommendations. The first such report shall be submitted not later than 12 months after .December 22, 1987
notes: Codificationand added identical sections.Pub. L. 100–202Pub. L. 100–203

Termination of Reporting RequirementsFor termination, effective , of provisions of this section relating to reporting to Congress 2 times per year, see , as amended, set out as a note under , Money and Finance, and the last item on page 186 of House Document No. 103–7.May 15, 2000section 3003 of Pub. L. 104–66section 1113 of Title 31
